'''Aay Zavos''' was a male member of the [[Galactic traders|Galactic Traders]] Guild who served as an emissary to [[King/Legends|King]] [[Kayos]] for the [[Chrome Companies]]. He was partial to the [[Independent Systems]] in their struggle against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] because of the trade restrictions in the Empire.

Zavos was a larger than normal [[Human/Legends|Human]], with sallow eyes. A [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[General/Legends|General]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] was named Aay Zavos. He resembles the trader Zavos, but was not convinced the Rebel plan to attack the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] would succeed. For this his was rebuked by [[Kane Starkiller]].

==Behind the scenes==
Zavos' criticism of the plan in the second draft was echoed in later drafts by the character known as "[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Fake Wedge]]." The character of [[Bail Antilles/Legends|Bail Antilles]], interestingly, was later to evolve into the real [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge]], so the comments by "Fake Wedge" were also not assigned to Wedge's conceptual counterpart.
